# `biwa activate`

- **Usage**: `biwa activate [--shell <SHELL>] [COMMAND]`

Print shell activation code and manage direct command shims

## Flags

### `--shell <SHELL>`

Print activation code for this shell

**Choices:**

- `bash`
- `zsh`
- `fish`

## Subcommands

- [`biwa activate doctor`](/cli/activate/doctor.md)
- [`biwa activate install [-f --force]`](/cli/activate/install.md)
